content.text:
Successfully completed Task 0 (100/100) and Task 1 (100/100) of the YatCC compiler construction experiment.

Task 0: Environment setup verified - program exits normally.

Task 1: Lexer implementation complete with:
- All token types defined in SYsULexer.g4 (keywords, operators, constants, etc.)
- Proper token name mapping to clang format in main.cpp
- Position tracking for file:line:column locations
- StartOfLine and LeadingSpace flag detection
- Correct output formatting matching clang -cc1 -dump-tokens format

Ready to proceed to Task 2 (Parser - JSON AST generation).
